name: digital-marketing-pro
description: Plan, execute, and measure digital marketing across all channels. 25 specialist agents handle strategy, SEO, paid ads, content, email, social, PR, analytics, CRO, and agency operations — with brand voice enforcement, quality evaluation, multilingual support, and persistent campaign memory. v2.6 adds 6 dedicated SEO sub-skills (programmatic SEO, competitor comparison pages, image SEO audit, single-page deep analysis, sitemap management, SEO strategic planning), expanded schema markup support (18 types with deprecation tracking), Google SEO quick reference, and DataForSEO MCP integration.
